title: FDA proposes excluding Novo, Lilly weight loss drugs from bulk compounding list in win for the companies
summary_full: If that proposal is finalized, the exclusion would likely limit the mass compounding of those medicines ​unless they appear on the FDA's ⁠drug shortage ⁠list.
summary_public: If that proposal is finalized, the exclusion would likely limit the mass compounding of those medicines ​unless they appear on the FDA's ⁠drug shortage ⁠list.
